summary: Admin Email Broadcast feature fully tested. All 16 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified with all components working correctly including AI Draft Generator, recipient selection, compose dialog, and email history.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: admin_email.py - All 6 endpoints implemented correctly with proper super_admin auth check
VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/email/recipients/summary - Returns therapist/client counts with email and plan breakdown
VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/email/recipients/list - Returns user list filtered by role (therapist/client)
VERIFIED: POST /api/admin/email/ai-draft - Uses Anthropic Claude API to generate email drafts
VERIFIED: POST /api/admin/email/send - Sends bulk emails via Resend, logs to admin_email_broadcasts collection
VERIFIED: GET /api/admin/email/history - Returns sent email history sorted by sent_at desc
VERIFIED: All endpoints return 403 for non-admin users (therapist tested)
VERIFIED: SuperAdminDashboard.js - Email Broadcast nav item added with Mail icon
VERIFIED: AdminEmailBroadcast.js - Full compose dialog with AI Draft Generator, 4 recipient types, subject/body inputs, preview toggle, send button
VERIFIED: All data-testid attributes present for testing
seed_data_creation: Test email broadcast sent to all_therapists during testing (logged in admin_email_broadcasts collection)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Email Broadcast feature is fully functional. Backend uses real Anthropic Claude API for AI drafts and real Resend for email sending. Test email was successfully sent during testing. All UI components have proper data-testid attributes.

components_verified: Email Broadcast nav item in sidebar
AI Draft Generator (topic, tone, audience, additional instructions)
Recipient type buttons (All Therapists, All Clients, By Plan, Specific Users)
Email Body textarea with Preview toggle
Email History toggle with sent records

api_test_results.GET /api/admin/email/recipients/summary: 200 OK - Returns {therapists: {total, with_email, by_plan}, clients: {total, with_email}}
api_test_results.POST /api/admin/email/ai-draft (admin): 200 OK - Returns {generated: true, data: {subject, html_body, text_body}}
api_test_results.GET /api/admin/email/history (admin): 200 OK - Returns list of sent broadcasts

mocked_api.notes: Uses real Anthropic Claude API for AI drafts and real Resend for email sending
